article.title: Build N’ Build这一次，是共建
article.preview_text:
在BSC的世界里
meme是情绪，是共识，是一群人同时相信某个未来的瞬间

起源
“Build N’ Build”并不是凭空出现的词
是CZ新书中明确提到 BNB Chain = Build N Build，中文就是“共建” 
BNB Chain 的核心理念之一

kept.text:
quotes+saves compound
likes expire

to get lift 12 36h later:
• one canonical line ppl can cite
• a prompt that travels without u

rule of thumb:
(q+s)/likes ~0.3 or higher means it has legs
spike w/o cites is dopamine, not distribution

optimize for downstream actions, not the first spike
CT keeps score

quoted_tweet.text:
gn

some of you still chasing likes on x
wrong meta on @wallchain

they care if your taie survives the night
nlt if it pops for 10 minutes

my read after a week of late sessions
replies that get quoted tomorrow move you more than threads that die tonight
one clean line people reuse as an answer beats five clever hooks
second wind matters more than first spike
tiny accounts can pass you if builders cite them twice

you don’t game that with noise
you earn it with clarity

i stopped blitz posting
picked one lane
left room for people to build on it
the bumps started landing during the quiet hours not the rush

heads up if you’re farming attention
this rail has a memory
it rewards posts that create follow on actions not just reactions

next lap i’m testing a single prompt built to travel across threads
if it gets picked up in rooms i’m not in that’s the signal

you optimizing for quotes and saves or for vanity likes?
